chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D — 3628 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 20.09.2023. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE ------- Mr. Zain ul Abidin Sahito Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Saleem Hashmi Qureshi Advocate for respondents No.2 & 3. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri A.A.G. Sindh. ---- As an indulgence only and as agreed three weeks’ time granted to make payment of an outstanding amount of Rs.8,58,513/-. Such amount shall either be paid directly in the account or a cross cheque be handed over within the specified time of three weeks. In case of a failure to either credit the account or on the failure to issue cross cheque, it shall be considered as a violation of order of this Court. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE A.
